notes: index_hint is the stack channel used by each rule plane.
rule_planes_9x9 contains padded 9x9 planes with the 4x4 board embedded at offset (0, 0).

channels.name: given_mask
channels.description: 1.0 on givens in the selected puzzle.

channels.name: anti_knight_active
channels.description: Global activation plane for anti-knight.

channels.name: counting_circles_active
channels.description: 1.0 on counting circle cells.

channels.name: differences_count_active
channels.description: 1.0 on cells in a differences-count line.

channels.name: differences_count_progress
channels.description: Normalized progress along the line.

channels.name: differences_count_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the line anchor.

channels.name: differences_count_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the line anchor.

channels.name: even_cells_active
channels.description: 1.0 on cells constrained to even digits.

channels.name: killer_active
channels.description: 1.0 on killer cage cells.

channels.name: killer_clue_sum
channels.description: Cage clue sum repeated on every cage cell.

channels.name: little_killer_progress
channels.description: Normalized progress along a little-killer path.

channels.name: little_killer_clue_sum
channels.description: Little-killer clue sum repeated on the path.

channels.name: mean_baby_snake_active
channels.description: Global activation plane for Mean Baby Snake.

channels.name: odd_cells_active
channels.description: 1.0 on cells constrained to odd digits.

channels.name: white_kropki_active
channels.description: 1.0 on cells touched by a white Kropki dot.

channels.name: white_kropki_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the white-dot anchor.

channels.name: white_kropki_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the white-dot anchor.

channels.name: black_kropki_active
channels.description: 1.0 on cells touched by a black Kropki dot.

channels.name: black_kropki_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the black-dot anchor.

channels.name: black_kropki_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the black-dot anchor.

channels.name: region_sum_active
channels.description: 1.0 on region-sum line cells.

channels.name: region_sum_segment_index
channels.description: Normalized segment index inside the line.

channels.name: region_sum_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the line anchor.

channels.name: region_sum_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the line anchor.

channels.name: renban_active
channels.description: 1.0 on Renban line cells.

channels.name: renban_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the line anchor.

channels.name: renban_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the line anchor.

channels.name: sunburn_active
channels.description: 1.0 on sunburn cells.

channels.name: thermo_active
channels.description: 1.0 on thermometer cells.

channels.name: thermo_progress
channels.description: Normalized progress from bulb to tip.

channels.name: thermo_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the bulb.

channels.name: thermo_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the bulb.

channels.name: zipper_active
channels.description: 1.0 on zipper cells.

channels.name: zipper_distance
channels.description: Normalized distance from the zipper center.

channels.name: zipper_anchor_row
channels.description: Normalized row code of the zipper center.

channels.name: zipper_anchor_col
channels.description: Normalized column code of the zipper center.
